QualityRunInlineRequest.description:
Ad-hoc quality run — caller supplies the test cases inline.
Used by admins + stewards to validate a case set against an asset
before persisting a quality_suites row.
QualityRunInlineRequest.title: QualityRunInlineRequest

post.description:
Phase 12 — admin-triggered batch runner. Drains up to `limit`
queued work items. Designed to let admins manually flush the queue
or be called from a Databricks Job on a schedule.

get.description:
Admin-only list of recent export jobs for the diagnostics surface.
Used by Phase 4 Tranche 2 admin dashboard.

Phase 14 — "Why can't I access this?" explainer.
Returns the auth mode, the actor's capability bundle, and a concrete
remediation list. The asset FQN is optional context — this is
designed to also work for generic auth diagnostics.

post.description:
Phase 12 — enqueue an async export. Writes a queued row to
export_jobs + background_work_items and returns the job_id so the
browser can poll `/api/export/{job_id}/status`.

Large exports exceed SYNC_EXPORT_MAX_ROWS so the sync endpoint
refuses them; this is the async path. A separate runner
(Phase 12 extension) materializes queued jobs under app-principal
auth subject to the token_captured_at freshness window.

get.description: Phase 12 — list recent export jobs for the current actor.

Re-download a previously materialized export. Enforces:
- actor-scoped auth
- requester identity match
- status == ready
- not expired
- token capture time not stale (>55 min)
Re-materializes CSV on demand — artifact is not persisted, preserving
the no-raw-artifact rule and ensuring any intervening visibility
changes apply.

Phase 12 — poll endpoint. Returns current status + timestamps for
the export job. Requester-identity gated so an actor can't read
another user's queued jobs.

Return a reverse-chronological audit timeline for a single asset.

Backs the AuditTimelineDrawer on the Governance page. Purely a read over
the existing metadata_audit_log table — no new schema is required. Entries
include before/after JSON so the UI can diff changes inline.

Query-param variant so asset_fqn (which contains dots) doesn't
have to collide with FastAPI's dot-unfriendly path parameter.

Phase 9 — multi-hop column lineage. Walks system.access.column_lineage
recursively, bounded by depth/node/fanout caps to fail closed against
runaway fan-out.

post.description:
Phase 10 — execute a set of quality test cases inline and
persist the results. Steward/admin gated because custom_sql
cases touch arbitrary data.
